justification: The diff updates Maven compiler settings to Java 21 and upgrades Mockito/ByteBuddy versions, but fails to migrate from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (removing junit 4.13.1 dependency but not adding junit-jupiter-engine, and not updating test code). It also removes unused imports but doesn't leverage Java 21 features like pattern matching or records. The removal of the JUnit 4 dependency without a replacement breaks the test infrastructure.
